world_spawning.spawn_surface_rule: solid non-water non-lava non-ice surface near player

growth.current_behavior: loaded AI hunters near players receive periodic rank/stat pressure tags and combat buffs
growth.next_needed: connect hunter kills, defeats, and rivalry state to Guild rank and bounty rewards

combat_bridge.behavior: nearby ar_ai_hunter CustomNPCs and hostile mobs are force-targeted against each other; hunters look at, path toward, and melee nearby hostile targets
combat_bridge.purpose: AI hunters should visibly fight monsters during field tests instead of standing idle beside hostile mobs

known_limitations: A-rank and S-rank currently reuse available rival texture assets until dedicated skins are generated.
The director creates living ranked hunter encounters, but story rivalry memory and reward contracts still need a later pass.
The combat bridge is a helper-side behavior assist, not final authored CustomNPC faction AI.
This does not place Guild Halls, Hunter Boards, roads, villages, or settlement content.
